content:
Our Story, Our Mission Built on tradition. Driven by passion. Committed to your growth.
How It All Began Sai Sports Unit Academy was founded in [YEAR] by Master [Instructor Name], a [X]th-degree black belt with over [N] years of competitive and coaching experience. What started as a small class of 12 students has grown into a thriving community of over 500 martial artists.
Our academy is affiliated with [your national/international federation, e.g., World Taekwondo or ATA] and follows an internationally recognized curriculum that balances traditional values with modern sports science.
We believe Taekwondo is more than kicks and punches — it is a lifelong discipline that shapes character, builds resilience, and creates leaders.
📸 Photo: Academy / Dojang Interior
Replace with static/images/dojang.jpg Our Philosophy 🥷 Discipline Every class begins and ends with respect. We hold our students to high standards — on the mat and in life.
🤝 Respect For instructors, training partners, opponents, and self. Respect is the foundation of all martial arts.
💪 Perseverance We do not quit. Whether it's a difficult technique or a tough tournament, we push through together.
🌟 Excellence We set a high bar for ourselves and celebrate every student's progress, no matter where they start.
Achievements & Credentials 🏆 [Year] State Championship — Gold Medal Our students represented the academy at the state level and brought home multiple medals in sparring and poomsae categories.
🌐 World Taekwondo Certified Coaches All head instructors hold internationally recognized certifications from [governing body].
📜 50+ Black Belt Graduates Since opening, we have promoted over 50 students to black belt — each one a testament to dedication and quality coaching.
🏫 School Partnership Program We partner with local schools to offer after-school Taekwondo programs, reaching kids who might not otherwise access martial arts.
Come Train With Us Meet our team and see our facility. Your first class is completely free.
Book a Free Trial Meet the Instructors

Get In Touch

We'd love to hear from you. Book a free trial, ask a question, or just come say hello.

<!-- ── Contact Info ── -->
<div class="contact-info">
  <h2>Academy Information</h2>

  <div class="contact-item">
    <span class="contact-icon">📍</span>
    <div>
      <strong>Address</strong><br>
      [Street Address]<br>
      [City, State ZIP]
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-item">
    <span class="contact-icon">📞</span>
    <div>
      <strong>Phone</strong><br>
      <a href="tel:+10000000000">(000) 000-0000</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-item">
    <span class="contact-icon">✉️</span>
    <div>
      <strong>Email</strong><br>
      <a href="mailto:info@youracademy.com">info@youracademy.com</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-item">
    <span class="contact-icon">🕐</span>
    <div>
      <strong>Office Hours</strong><br>
      Mon – Fri: 3:30 PM – 8:30 PM<br>
      Saturday: 8:30 AM – 1:30 PM<br>
      Sunday: Closed
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-social">
    <a href="https://facebook.com/yourpage" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="social-icon-link">📘 Facebook</a>
    <a href="https://instagram.com/yourpage" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="social-icon-link">📸 Instagram</a>
    <a href="https://youtube.com/@yourchannel" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="social-icon-link">▶️ YouTube</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── Contact Form ── -->
<div class="contact-form-wrapper">
  <h2>Send Us a Message</h2>
  <p class="form-note">Fill in the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours. Or <a href="tel:+10000000000">call us</a> for a faster response.</p>

  <!--
    FORM OPTIONS:
    A) Formspree (free, simple): action="https://formspree.io/f/YOUR_FORM_ID"
    B) Netlify Forms: add netlify attribute
    C) Google Forms embed (see below)
    Replace the placeholder below with your actual form solution.
  -->
  <form class="contact-form" action="https://formspree.io/f/YOUR_FORM_ID" method="POST">
    <div class="form-row">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="name">Your Name *</label>
        <input type="text" id="name" name="name" placeholder="John Smith" required>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="phone">Phone Number</label>
        <input type="tel" id="phone" name="phone" placeholder="(000) 000-0000">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label for="email">Email Address *</label>
      <input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="you@email.com" required>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label for="interest">I'm interested in...</label>
      <select id="interest" name="interest">
        <option value="">— Select a program —</option>
        <option value="little-tigers">Little Tigers (Ages 4–7)</option>
        <option value="junior-champions">Junior Champions (Ages 8–14)</option>
        <option value="teen-adult">Teen & Adult (Ages 15+)</option>
        <option value="black-belt">Black Belt Program</option>
        <option value="self-defense">Self-Defense Workshop</option>
        <option value="private">Private Lessons</option>
        <option value="other">Other / General Enquiry</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label for="message">Message</label>
      <textarea id="message" name="message" rows="4" placeholder="Tell us a bit about yourself or your child, any questions you have, or preferred class times..."></textarea>
    </div>
    <button type="submit" class="btn-primary btn-full">Send Message 📤</button>
  </form>
</div>

Find Us

🗺️ Google Maps Embed
Replace this block with your Google Maps iframe.
Go to maps.google.com → Search your address → Share → Embed a map

Frequently Asked Questions

<div class="faq-item">
  <h4>❓ Do I need any experience to join?</h4>
  <p>Absolutely not. We welcome complete beginners of all ages. Your first class is free with no commitment.</p>
</div>

<div class="faq-item">
  <h4>❓ What should I wear to my first class?</h4>
  <p>Comfortable sportswear (tracksuit, shorts, t-shirt) is fine for your trial class. Once you enroll, we'll help you get the right uniform (dobok).</p>
</div>

<div class="faq-item">
  <h4>❓ How long does it take to get a black belt?</h4>
  <p>For a dedicated student training 2–3 times per week, the average time is 4–5 years. It varies by age, commitment, and natural progress.</p>
</div>

<div class="faq-item">
  <h4>❓ Is Taekwondo safe for young children?</h4>
  <p>Yes — with proper supervision and age-appropriate instruction, Taekwondo is one of the safest martial arts for children. Our Little Tigers classes are non-contact and focus on fun fundamentals.</p>
</div>

<div class="faq-item">
  <h4>❓ Do you offer family discounts?</h4>
  <p>Yes! We offer sibling and family membership discounts. Contact us for details.</p>
</div>

<div class="faq-item">
  <h4>❓ What if I miss a class?</h4>
  <p>We offer make-up classes for missed sessions. Just let your instructor know in advance when possible.</p>
</div>
title: Contact Us

title: Our Instructors

content:
Programs for Every Age & Level World-class training tailored to where you are — and where you want to go.
Ages 4 – 7 🐯 Little Tigers Where champions begin.
Our Little Tigers program is specially designed for young children who are just discovering movement, coordination, and social skills. Through games, music, and beginner Taekwondo techniques, we make every class an adventure while quietly building focus, listening, and respect.
<h4>What They'll Learn:</h4> <ul> <li>Basic kicks, stances, and blocks</li> <li>Following instructions and class etiquette</li> <li>Stranger danger and personal safety concepts</li> <li>Teamwork, turn-taking, and positive reinforcement</li> <li>Belt progression with age-appropriate grading</li> </ul> <div class="program-meta-grid"> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Class Size:</strong> Max 12 students</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Duration:</strong> 45 minutes</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Uniform:</strong> Provided on enrollment</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Belt Range:</strong> White → High Yellow</div> </div> <a href="/taekwondo-academy/contact/" class="btn-primary">Book a Free Trial</a> Ages 8 – 14 ⚡ Junior Champions Build confidence. Compete. Excel.
Junior Champions is our flagship kids' program. Students follow the full Taekwondo curriculum — poomsae (forms), sparring, board breaking, and character development. Regular belt gradings provide clear milestones, and tournament participation is encouraged for those who want to compete.
<h4>What They'll Learn:</h4> <ul> <li>Full WTF/WT poomsae curriculum through colored belts</li> <li>Olympic-style sparring with full protective gear</li> <li>Breaking techniques (board & rebreakable boards)</li> <li>Self-defense scenarios appropriate for their age</li> <li>Goal-setting, leadership, and mental toughness</li> </ul> <div class="program-meta-grid"> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Class Size:</strong> Max 20 students</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Duration:</strong> 60 minutes</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Gear:</strong> Sparring gear required at red belt</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Belt Range:</strong> White → Red Belt</div> </div> <a href="/taekwondo-academy/contact/" class="btn-primary">Book a Free Trial</a> Ages 15+ 🔥 Teen & Adult Program No experience needed. Just the will to start.
Our adult program welcomes complete beginners and experienced martial artists alike. Classes balance technical skill development, fitness, and competition preparation. Adults especially appreciate the stress-relieving power of a focused workout that also sharpens the mind.
<h4>What You'll Get:</h4> <ul> <li>Full Taekwondo curriculum from white belt to black belt</li> <li>High-intensity sparring and conditioning sessions</li> <li>Poomsae training for grading and competition</li> <li>Flexibility, core strength, and cardiovascular fitness</li> <li>A welcoming community of like-minded adults</li> </ul> <div class="program-meta-grid"> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Class Size:</strong> Max 25 students</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Duration:</strong> 75 minutes</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Fitness Level:</strong> All welcome</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Belt Range:</strong> White → Black Belt</div> </div> <a href="/taekwondo-academy/contact/" class="btn-primary">Book a Free Trial</a> All Ages · Invitation 🏆 Black Belt Program The pinnacle of your martial arts journey.
Invitation-only for dedicated color-belt students demonstrating exceptional commitment. The Black Belt Program provides advanced poomsae, deeper sparring strategy, referee and leadership training, and preparation for national tournaments. This is where champions are refined.
<h4>Program Highlights:</h4> <ul> <li>Advanced poomsae: Koryo, Keumgang, Taebaek and beyond</li> <li>National and international competition preparation</li> <li>Leadership and junior instructor opportunities</li> <li>Strength & conditioning tailored for competitive athletes</li> <li>Direct mentorship from Master [Instructor Name]</li> </ul> <div class="program-meta-grid"> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Entry Requirement:</strong> Red/Black belt or instructor invite</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Duration:</strong> 90 minutes</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Schedule:</strong> Separate timetable</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Belt Range:</strong> 1st Dan and above</div> </div> <a href="/taekwondo-academy/contact/" class="btn-primary">Enquire Now</a> Ages 12+ 🛡️ Self-Defense Workshop Real skills for real situations.
This monthly workshop series focuses on practical self-defense drawn from Taekwondo, with emphasis on awareness, de-escalation, and effective techniques anyone can use. Great as a standalone course or as a supplement to regular training.
<h4>Topics Covered:</h4> <ul> <li>Situational awareness and threat assessment</li> <li>Escapes from grabs, holds, and common attacks</li> <li>Verbal de-escalation strategies</li> <li>Safety for children: stranger awareness module</li> <li>Confidence-building drills with a partner</li> </ul> <div class="program-meta-grid"> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Format:</strong> Monthly workshop (2 hours)</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Cost:</strong> Included in membership / $[X] drop-in</div> </div> <a href="/taekwondo-academy/schedule/" class="btn-primary">See Upcoming Dates</a> All Ages 👤 Private Lessons Focused. Personalized. Fast results.
Work one-on-one with a certified instructor to fast-track your progress, iron out specific techniques, or prepare intensively for grading or competition. Private sessions are fully customized around your goals and schedule.
<div class="program-meta-grid"> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Duration:</strong> 30 or 60 minutes</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Location:</strong> Academy or online (technique review)</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Pricing:</strong> Contact us for rates</div> <div class="program-meta-item"><strong>Availability:</strong> Subject to instructor schedule</div> </div> <a href="/taekwondo-academy/contact/" class="btn-primary">Book a Private Lesson</a> Membership Plans Simple, transparent pricing. summary:
Programs for Every Age & Level

World-class training tailored to where you are — and where you want to go.

Ages 4 – 7

🐯 Little Tigers

Where champions begin.

Our Little Tigers program is specially designed for young children who are just discovering movement, coordination, and social skills. Through games, music, and beginner Taekwondo techniques, we make every class an adventure while quietly building focus, listening, and respect.
